overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long CMG Daily ETF (CMGG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide daily 2x leveraged exposure to the price performance of Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. (NASDAQ: CMG) stock, less fees, and expenses CMGG was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
